programmes.show_description: Crime thriller with Samuel L Jackson. A district attorney lets a felon go free due to his own guilt, but is compelled to personally bring him to justice when the man goes on a killing spree.
Airborne action with Kelsey Grammer. A professional thief who owes the mob a large sum of money is forced to rob a futuristic flying casino filled with the world's most dangerous criminals.

The Judge reads a woman the riot act when she allegedly uses the family court system to evict a tenant by means of a questionable restraining order.
When a German Shepherd puppy dies, pet owners blame the breeder; the Judge investigates allegations of parvo running rampant in the litter.
A man denies having intimate relations with a woman; she claims he lived with her for two months and assaulted her daughter.
A woman goes after her estranged daughter-in-law for thousands in unpaid loans; she is met with rage over an allegedly deadbeat husband.
Afraid that her intoxicated friend was about to be raped, a woman claims she pushed through an already broken window to rescue her; she is sued for breaking the window.
Accused of being a crook after allegedly selling a $500 rug for $7500, a carpet shop owner denies all charges and insists the married couple was satisfied at the time of their purchase.
A teenager accuses a teacher of punching him in the chest during an incident at school; the teacher countersues for attorney fees and punitive damages.
Teenagers brawl in a parking lot and the police are called in; damages from alleged kicking, spitting on and keying cars are disputed.
Ex-lovers who met on Tinder fight over the termination of an alleged pregnancy which ends in a car crash.

The body of an unidentified woman is found on a highway. Riverside County Sheriffs have no leads, until years later when anonymous letters are sent to a journalist.
Wrapped in a blanket, beaten and abandoned near a roadside - the small community of Lennon, Michigan was left reeling in 1997 as one of its beloved locals, Mary Prieur, was found dead.
A famed L.A. hairstylist is killed in his backyard - was it a robbery gone wrong by thugs called the knock-knock burglars or a twisted plot no one could believe?
When a young woman falls from a cliff to her death, forensic examination of photographs from the scene uncover a sinister truth.
A Daughter's Journey: Analysing the evidence, the medical detectives solve real crimes using forensic techniques, alongside reconstructions (which may be unsuitable for younger viewers).

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. A girl is the only witness to Trent's stabbing attack, and the Rangers need her to identify the assailant.
Crime drama with Matthew McConaughey. An unlucky prospector teams up with a geologist and sets off on a journey to find gold in the uncharted jungle of Indonesia.
Crime thriller with Danny Dyer. A reformed ex-convict and his friend embark on a series of increasingly desperate scams to gather £100,000 to repay a loan shark before his mother is killed.
Action thriller with Steven Seagal. An Interpol agent goes on a rampage through the Eastern European underworld to hunt down the Russian gun smugglers responsible for killing his partner.
Tense thriller with Brian Cox. An elderly, reclusive widower is left distraught when his beloved dog is murdered by three teenagers, and decides to dish out justice by any means necessary.

A teenager accused of stealing thousands from his grandmother's safety deposit box, says his grandfather gave him the lock combination.
A model's emotional-support French Bulldog is allegedly attacked by a German Shepherd Husky at a fashion shoot.
A woman claims she never hit a fellow motorist's vehicle but offered to get out of her Tesla and personally microfiber any scratches from it.
After a mother witnesses her son's violent death, she and her husband struggle to payback alleged loans to a family member.
Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases.

Two young lovers are ambushed by a gun wielding assailant in Beaufort County, South Carolina, before he disappears - leaving eighteen-year-old David Krulewicz dead.
As a group of NCIS officers celebrate Christmas Eve, 1991 in California, a group of armed men storm the celebration, killing Corporal. Lindell Mitchell during the altercation.

Tense sci-fi thriller with Aaron Eckhart. A platoon of soldiers is sent into battle against an alien invasion force that has landed on America's west coast.
Action adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. An ex-assassin is blackmailed into eliminating a target who is on a expedition, sending the hit-man on a perilous climb up the Eiger.
